revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Colored_link%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == {{Warning|'''Links in prose should never be manually colored.''' ([[:en:MOS:LINKCOLOR|MOS:LINKCOLOR]])}} {{Warning|'''When using this template, make sure you only use it on a colored background to avoid issues with dark mode. [[mw:Recommendations_for_night_mode_compatibility_on_Wikimedia_wikis#Use_CSS_variables_or_CSS_design_tokens_with_fallback_for_background_and_text_where_possible|More information about how to ensure dark mode compatibility]].''' ([[:en:MOS:LINKCOLOR|MOS:LINKCOLOR]])}} This template takes three parameters: the color of the link, the article being linked to, and optional text to display as a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. {{tlc|colored link|2=purple|3=Page name to link|4=Alternative text}} → {{colored link|purple|Page name to link|Alternative text}} Use noinvert = yes to preserve the link color in [[WP:dark mode|dark mode]]: {{tlc|colored link|2=purple|3=Page name to link|4=Alternative text|5=noinvert=yes}} → {{colored link|purple|Page name to link|Alternative text|noinvert=yes}} == See also == * {{Tl|Aqua}} → {{Aqua|Main page}} * {{Tl|Black}} → {{Black|Main page}} * {{Tl|Blue}} → {{Blue|Main page}} * {{Tl|Brown}} → {{Brown|Main page}} * {{Tl|Cyan}} → {{Cyan|Main page}} * {{Tl|Fuchsia}} → {{Fuchsia|Main page}} * {{Tl|Gold (color)}} → {{Gold (color)|Main page}} * {{Tl|Gray}} → {{Gray|Main page}} * {{Tl|Green}} → {{Green|Main page}} * {{Tl|Lime}} → {{Lime|Main page}} * {{Tl|Link blue}} → {{Link blue|Main page}} * {{Tl|Magenta}} → {{Magenta|Main page}} * {{Tl|Maroon}} → {{Maroon|Main page}} * {{Tl|Navy (color)}} → {{Navy (color)|Main page}} * {{Tl|Olive}} → {{Olive|Main page}} * {{Tl|Orange}} → {{Orange|Main page}} * {{Tl|Pink}} → {{Pink|Main page}} * {{Tl|Purple}} → {{Purple|Main page}} * {{Tl|Red}} → {{Red|Main page}} * {{Tl|Teal}} → {{Teal|Main page}} * {{Tl|White}} → {{White|Main page}} * {{Tl|Yellow}} → {{Yellow|Main page}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Text color templates]] [[Category:Internal link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
